questionHtml:
What is the sum of the coefficients when the equation is balanced with whole numbers?

__Sn(OH)4 (aq) + __NaOH (aq) → __Na2SnO3 (aq) + __H2O (l)

A.  4

B.  5

C.  6

D.  7

meta.title: What is the sum of the coefficients when the equation is balanced with whole numbers? __Sn(OH)4 (aq) + __NaOH (aq) → __Na2SnO3 (aq) + __H2O (l) A. 4 B. 5 C. 6 D. 7
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 2. How much, how fast and how far?
Reactivity 2.1—How much? The amount of chemical change
Reactivity 2.1.1—Chemical equations show the ratio of reactants and products in a reaction. Deduce chemical equations when reactants and products are specified.
